evaluation.summary: RMT-corrected Chebyshev bias shows order-of-magnitude agreement but variance error remains high, and the LDAB model only marginally improves KL divergence, indicating partial validation rather than a definitive breakthrough.
next_directions: Increase simulation size for RMT predictions to reduce variance error
Examine higher moduli beyond 210 to test generality of the bias
Integrate more robust statistical tests for bias and LDAB model performance
